title: Sources and Types of E-Waste
description: A flowchart illustrating the major sources of electronic waste and the common types of equipment generated from each source.
relationships: Households generate IT & Telecom Equipment and Consumer Electronics
Businesses & Offices generate IT & Telecom Equipment and Large Household Appliances
Government & Institutions generate IT & Telecom Equipment and Medical Equipment
Manufacturing & Industry generates Industrial Tools and Large Household Appliances
